rag_rules: Generate assume/guarantee clauses for deployment binding intents using component and target identifiers as visible symbols.
generic_rules: Map descriptive deployment intents to assume/guarantee contracts that constrain binding relationships.
Ensure all referenced entities in contracts are either component-local or explicitly visible in scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use 'assume' for constraints on system behavior, 'guarantee' for obligations the component must fulfill.
Use 'eq' or 'const' only when defining named expressions or constants that support contract logic.
anti_patterns: Do not use assign or validator-specific syntax; AGREE annexes must remain declarative and contract-focused.
